@@ -207,7 +207,7 @@
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-kwa","title":"Fail-fast remote curl|bash invocations in install.sh","description":"Several remote installer invocations in install.sh run via subshells without pipefail (e.g., oh-my-zsh uses sh -c with curl output, and multiple run_as_target bash -c "curl ... | sh"). If curl fails, the subshell can still return success and the installer continues. Fix by running these under bash with set -euo pipefail and passing args safely, so download/exec failures abort correctly.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-20T15:17:16.089137-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-20T15:20:45.480511-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-20T15:20:45.480511-05:00","close_reason":"Wrap remote installer subshells with set -euo pipefail so curl failures abort; also make stack remote installer helper pass args safely and avoid masking download errors.","labels":["installer","reliability"]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-kwk","title":"Vendor NTM command_palette.md for onboarding","description":"# Task: Vendor NTM Command Palette

## Description
Copy and maintain a local version of NTM's command_palette.md for use in onboarding.

## Background
The onboard TUI needs to show NTM's prompt palette to users. Rather than fetch it live (requires internet), we vendor a copy.

## Implementation

### Vendor Location
`acfs/onboard/docs/ntm/command_palette.md`

### Sync Script
`scripts/sync/sync_ntm_palette.sh`

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# Sync NTM command palette from upstream

SOURCE="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/main/command_palette.md"
DEST="acfs/onboard/docs/ntm/command_palette.md"

curl -fsSL "$SOURCE" > "$DEST"
echo "Synced command_palette.md"
```

### Install Location
Deployed to: `~/.acfs/docs/ntm/command_palette.md`

### Onboard Integration
In Mission 6, show the palette using:
- bat (pretty) if available
- less as fallback

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Sync script works
- [ ] Palette included in installer
- [ ] Displayed in onboard Mission 6
- [ ] Readable over SSH","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T22:28:15.931606-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-20T12:22:39.515282-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-20T12:22:39.515282-05:00","close_reason":"Vendored NTM command_palette.md to acfs/onboard/docs/ntm/. Added sync script scripts/sync/sync_ntm_palette.sh with --check mode. Commit 2a09af8.","labels":["onboard","task"]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-kyhv","title":"TASK: Add lesson completion celebration screen","description":"# TASK: Add lesson completion celebration screen

## Context
When user completes a lesson, show a brief celebration before moving to next.

## Proposed Screen
```
╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│  🎉 Lesson Complete: tmux Basics                            │
│                                                             │
│  You learned:                                               │
│  • Creating sessions with ntm new                           │
│  • Attaching/detaching with Ctrl+B, D                       │
│  • Listing sessions with ntm list                           │
│                                                             │
│  Progress: ████████████░░░░░░░░ 5/9 (56%)                  │
│                                                             │
│  [Enter] Continue to next lesson                            │
│  [m] Return to menu                                         │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
```

## Implementation

### Lesson Summary Data
Add to each lesson markdown a summary section:
```markdown
<!-- SUMMARY
- Creating sessions with ntm new
- Attaching/detaching with Ctrl+B, D
- Listing sessions with ntm list
-->
```

Or define in onboard.sh as associative array.

### Celebration Function
```bash
onboard_show_completion() {
  local lesson_num=$1
  local lesson_title=$(get_lesson_title $lesson_num)
  local summary=$(get_lesson_summary $lesson_num)
  # Render celebration screen
  # Wait for keypress
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Celebration shown after lesson completion
- [ ] Shows lesson title and summary points
- [ ] Shows updated progress bar
- [ ] Enter continues, m returns to menu
- [ ] Works with gum and plain fallback","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-22T14:59:49.050712-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-22T15:23:43.155042-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-22T15:23:43.155042-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented celebration screen with lesson summaries, progress bar, gum UI with fallback, and next/menu navigation","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-kyhv","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-gjnn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T15:00:11.532879-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-l2w","title":"Harden sync_ntm_palette.sh: HTTPS-only curl + single-fetch hashing","description":"scripts/sync/sync_ntm_palette.sh currently uses plain curl -fsSL and may fetch the remote file twice when computing the hash. Align with scripts/lib/security.sh (HTTPS-only curl args + enforce_https) and compute remote hash from a single fetch.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GreenDog","created_at":"2025-12-20T20:46:02.630169-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-20T20:51:03.294991-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-20T20:51:03.294991-05:00","close_reason":"Resolved on main: sync_ntm_palette.sh now uses scripts/lib/security.sh for HTTPS-only curl + single-fetch hashing (commit d683f1f). Shellcheck clean.","labels":["scripts","security"]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-l82e","title":"Task: Add installation output interpretation guide","description":"","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-22T23:47:20.770441-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T13:15:43.950908-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-23T13:15:43.950908-05:00","close_reason":"Addressed in r1z5 and existing run-installer page content: SSH disconnect warning (already present), installation output interpretation (added), curl command explanation (already present)","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-l82e","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-r1z5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T23:52:54.359928-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-lbo","title":"doctor: include user tool dirs in PATH","description":"scripts/lib/doctor.sh relies on PATH-only lookups, so running `acfs doctor` in a non-zshrc environment (fresh ssh, bash shell, etc.) can falsely report missing tools that are installed under ~/.local/bin, ~/.bun/bin, ~/.cargo/bin, etc. Make doctor self-contained by prepending common ACFS install dirs to PATH before checks (and optionally improve version detection for commands like go/tmux).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"FuchsiaCreek","created_at":"2025-12-20T17:46:21.82316-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-20T18:18:48.406739-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-20T18:18:48.406739-05:00","close_reason":"doctor self-contained PATH + version handling"}
